prompt: A rectangular swimming pool measures 10 meters in length and 6 meters in width. A uniform border of tiles is installed around all sides of the pool, adding 1 meter to *each* dimension (length and width) on *both* sides. After the tiles are installed, the entire tiled surface (pool + border) needs a special protective coating. The coating costs $1.50 per square meter. However, for any area exceeding 80 square meters, a 15% discount is applied to the per-square-meter cost. What is the total cost of the protective coating?
